## Work Item

- [ ] PR title uses format `[W-xxxxxxx] short description`
- Work item / reference:

## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- In scope:
- Out of scope:

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run prettier:verify`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Additional Salesforce validation (if applicable)

## Security and Platform Checks

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] CRUD/FLS and sharing considerations reviewed
- [ ] Governor limits/bulkification considerations reviewed
- [ ] User-facing text externalized where needed

- Deployment steps:
- Backout plan:
- Breaking changes:
